title: RESOURCE DEPARTMENT - 211info
text: BAY AREA FIRST STEP INC RESOURCE DEPARTMENT Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides a drop in space for social activities. Offers assistance with resume building, help to quit smoking, and access to support groups for substance use issues and parenting. 155 S Empire Boulevard Coos Bay, OR 97420 Eligibility: Individuals and families with minor children in substance use disorder recovery Hours: Monday/Thursday 8am-8pm, Tuesday-Wednesday/Friday 8am-5pm, Saturday 1pm-4pm, Sunday 8am-4:30pm Email (541) 756-3111 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers (541) 756-3111 Main phone (541) 756-2111 FAX Main phone (541) 756-3111 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Walk in or visit website for more information FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None AREA SERVED: Coos County Services: Drop In Centers * Substance Use Disorder Issues General Addictions/Substance Use Disorder Support Groups Parent Support Groups * Substance Use Disorder Issues Prejob Guidance * Substance Use Disorder Issues Smoking/Vaping Cessation Other Services Offered At This Location: SUBSTANCE USE DISORDER SERVICES - LAKEVIEW VILLAGE APARTMENTS SUBSTANCE USE DISORDER SERVICES - SHERIDAN AVENUE NARR ACCREDITED RECOVERY HOUSING If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. BAY AREA FIRST STEP INC
